Index.title: Automatic Pearl & Stud Attaching Machines
Index.description: Compare automatic pearl, half pearl and stud attaching machines for garment and textile production. Request a quote from Pearl Machine in Istanbul.
Index.heroTitle: Automatic Pearl & Stud Attaching Machines for Textile Production
Index.heroSubtitle: Pearl Machine supplies automatic pearl, half pearl and stud attaching machines for garment factories, textile workshops and accessory production lines. Compare the models, check the specs and request the right setup before you buy.
Index.applicationTitle: For pearl, half pearl and stud work on garments
Index.applicationDescription: The catalog covers upper-supply pearl attaching machines, four-color pearl machines and computerized pattern work. Each model page lists speed, pearl size, power, air compressor needs, machine weight and work area so buyers can qualify the machine before contacting sales.
Index.experienceDesc: Laser marking and upper attaching help operators place pearls on the intended point without marking the reverse side of the garment.
Index.qualityDesc: Standard pearl models list 190 pieces per minute. The computerized UGR-NF-D9 supports 100 to 280 rpm, with higher speed available when required.
Index.supportDesc: Send your pearl size, fabric type, production volume and target machine model. Pearl Machine replies from its Istanbul contact office.
Index.quoteTitle: What to send before asking for a quote
Index.quoteDescription: A good machine recommendation depends on the garment, pearl type and daily production target. Send these details and the sales team can point you to the right model faster.

quoteItems.pearlSize: Pearl, half pearl or stud size
quoteItems.production: Daily quantity and country of delivery

Footer.about: Pearl Machine supplies automatic pearl, half pearl and stud attaching machines for garment and textile production.

Products.title: Pearl Attaching Machines
Products.description: Compare automatic pearl, half pearl and computerized pearl design machines by speed, pearl size, colors and use case.

About.title: Automatic pearl attaching machines for textile production
About.intro: Pearl Machine focuses on machinery for pearl, half pearl and stud application in garment and textile work. The catalog is built for buyers who need to compare machine capability before requesting a quote.

points.catalog: The product range includes two-color pearl machines, four-color pearl machines, half pearl models and computerized pattern machines.
points.specs: Each listed machine includes practical specs such as speed, pearl size, machine size, weight, air compressor need and power consumption.
points.contact: Sales inquiries are handled through the Istanbul contact address in English, Turkish and Arabic.

ProductDetails.responseTime: Response time typically within 24 business hours.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.description: Get in touch with our expert team for inquiries about our pearl attaching machines.
Contact.formSubheader: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you within 24 hours.
